        padframe_config.design_name,
        padframe_def_path,
        dbu_per_micron,

    console.print(f"✓ Generated {padframe_def_path}")
    outputs["padframe_def"] = padframe_def_path

    # 2. Core DEF placeholder path (overwritten by build_wrapper_def in full_flow)
    core_def_path = design_output_dir / "core.def"
    outputs["core_def"] = core_def_path

    # 3. Padframe Verilog
    padframe_v_path = design_output_dir / "padframe.v"
    write_padframe_verilog(
        placement_result,
        padframe_config,
        lef_parser,
        padframe_v_path,
        verilog_blackbox,
    )
    console.print(f"✓ Generated {padframe_v_path}")
    outputs["padframe_verilog"] = padframe_v_path

    # 4. Core Verilog
    core_v_path = design_output_dir / "core.v"
    write_core_verilog(
        padframe_config,
        lef_parser,
        core_v_path,
    )
